name: undercover-mode
description: When contributing to public or open-source repositories where AI attribution should be hidden. Use when the user says "stealth mode," "undercover," "no AI attribution," "hide AI," "contribute anonymously," "clean commits," "no co-authored-by," or when working on repos where AI involvement should not be visible. Strips all AI fingerprints from commits, PRs, code comments, and generated content.
